text:
There once was a little cat named Olive. One day while she was playing under the big oak tree near her house, she heard the sweetest singing.

Olive sneaked closer and listened... It was a robin.

With wide eyes, she watched. The cheerful song never ceased. One day she bravely swooped down and tugged the tiny bird from mid-song. They became inseparable.

Olive took the robin back to her home. She fed him worms from her bowl. They sang together all day.

Neighbors liked them so much they made them owl buddies. Each night they'd listen to the owls’ great conversations.

But one autumn, when the leaves turned golden, Olive grew lonely again. She called to the owl. "Come back!"

But that was just owl chatter.

One grey morning, just as dawn's light touched the sky, the owl soared silently away.

Olive sat quietly. When night fell, she flew after him.

They soared high through forests. They
